leadText: Steadfast (Japanese: ふくつのこころ Indomitable Heart) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast increases the Pokémon's Speed stat by one stage whenever it flinches . The Speed boost will only apply if the flinching message is displayed. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Steadfast increases the Pokémon's Speed stat by one stage whenever it flinches . The Speed boost will only apply if the flinching message is displayed.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's Movement Speed when it is cross-eyed or cringing. B S L まどわしか ひるみじょうたいに なると いどうそくどが あがる MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokémon gets the flinch status condition, its Travel Speed goes up! MD RT DX When the Pokémon gets the Flinch condition, its Travel Speed goes up.
